title: [exportverilog] "automatic logic" variables should try to fold their initializers

features.name: automatic logic declaration in procedural block
features.description: Code should include an 'automatic logic' variable declared within an 'initial' procedural block

features.name: declaration-assignment split pattern for expression splitting
features.description: Code should include a pattern where a temporary variable is declared separately and then assigned, when the initializer could be folded into the declaration

features.name: bit slice assignment from temporary
features.description: Code should include a bit-slice extraction from a temporary variable assigned in a procedural block
